subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto them that have quaffed the choice wine of revelation when its seal was broken by the finger of might of their Lord, the Almighty, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن شرب رحیق الوحی اذ فک ختمه باصبع قدرة ربه المقتدر القدیر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @belief and denial, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
